authoritative_rendering.decision: Spine = the production rendering in course-content/courses/tejal-APC-C1/C1M1Part01.md ('Part 1: The Call - Setting the Stage & Chapter 1') for Slides 1, 2, 4, and the Summary. Slide 3 and Slides 5-8 carry content from the newer 'C1M1: Gemini Updated' rendering inside tejal-c1m1-fresh-outline/source-outline.md per operator decisions. Final roster = 9 slides.

cross_validation_and_enrichment_sources: source-outline.md 'C1M1: Gemini Updated' (lines 323-433) — newer pass of the same opening slides; narration byte-identical to spine for Slides 1-4; source of the 4 expansion slides (5-8) and the Slide 5 transition narration

source-outline.md module page/navigation structure (Pages 1-7, lines 33-218) — source of the Slide 3 exemplar swap (Examples of Physician Innovators, lines 160-175) and Slide 4 formal definitions (lines 183-184)
authoritative_rendering.why: Operator (via Marcus calibration) set Part 1 = a small SOURCE roster, then explicitly OVERRODE the 5-7 cap on 2026-06-30 to fold in the 4 richer Gemini-Updated expansion units. The sprawling multi-page 'Part 1' in source-outline.md remains the CourseArc module nav structure (out of scope as standalone slides) but is mined for the Slide 3 exemplars and Slide 4 definitions.
authoritative_rendering.renderings_relationship: COMPLEMENTARY / lineage. (a) source-outline.md Pages 1-7 = module nav structure (whole-module scope; mined for enrichment + Slide 3 swap). (b) C1M1Part01.md = lean Part-1 spine. (c) source-outline.md 'Gemini Updated' Part 1 = newer expanded pass of (b): identical Slide 1-4 narration plus 4 expansion slides + a Part-2 transition. The expansion slides and the Slide 3 swap are now MERGED into the built roster per operator.

totals.scope_override: Operator consciously overrode the earlier 5-7 source-slide cap on 2026-06-30 to integrate the 4 expansion units. Recorded as a deliberate decision, not scope creep.

Each is kept as its own numbered slide per operator; the conceptual tie is noted in-file (S6 -> Psychological Safety on S4/S5; S8 -> Functional Flexibility on S7).
expansion_slides_folded_in.embedded_video_handling: Slide 7's YouTube video is integral (framed by pre/post narration) so it is retained as a slide asset, not excluded as a standalone embedded-video component.

slide_03_exemplar_swap.decision: Operator 2026-06-30 — SWAP Slide 3 exemplars from the spine set (Fogarty/Pronovost/Bath, no citations) to the newer cited 'Examples of Physician Innovators' set (most recent SME intention).

learning_objectives.reconciliation: None performed — both LO sets preserved verbatim; merging would be authoring, not extraction.

lexicon_vs_slide4_overlap.finding: Slide 5 (Innovation Lexicon) is a broader 8-term vocabulary set; 5 terms are UNIQUE to it (Innovation, Intrapreneurship, Systemic Friction, Root Cause vs. Symptom, Functional Flexibility). 3 terms OVERLAP Slide 4's staged definitions.

overlapping_terms.First Principles Thinking: IDENTICAL wording (Slide 4's enrichment was itself sourced from the Lexicon, line 361).
overlapping_terms.Psychological Safety: DIFFERENT wording — Slide 4 = Edmondson formal definition; Lexicon = course-restated version.
overlapping_terms.Growth Mindset: DIFFERENT wording — Slide 4 = Dweck formal definition; Lexicon = course-restated, clinical-leadership-framed version.

lexicon_vs_slide4_overlap.disposition: Operator confirmed Slide 4 definitions SHIP. Both versions kept verbatim and cross-flagged in slide-04, slide-05, and the roster for de-dupe at DECK time (a deck-assembly decision, not an extraction drop).
lexicon_vs_slide4_overlap.is_lexicon_a_different_vocab_set: Partly. It is NOT the QI/Innovation/Disruption concentric-circle vocabulary (that lives elsewhere in the module nav structure). It is a problem-framing + mindset lexicon that supersets Slide 4's three mindset terms.

open_items_for_operator: Lexicon (Slide 5) vs Slide 4 overlap: decide at deck time whether to collapse the 3 shared mindset terms or keep both with cross-reference. Default here: both shipped, flagged.
Slide 4 'Gemini Updated' rendering omits the 'First principles' definition label that the spine includes; spine version retained. Confirm if undesired.
fabrication_attestation: All slide bodies, narration, references, definitions, exemplar descriptions, and learning objectives are copied verbatim from the cited source files at the cited line ranges. No content was summarized, paraphrased, invented, or 'improved'. The ONLY normalization applied: markdown-escape backslashes and stray list-marker artifacts from the raw Notion/Gemini export were removed (e.g. '\$' -> '$', '\*\*' -> '**', '\&' -> '&', '\#' -> '#') so the text renders cleanly; no words were added, removed, or reordered. The 4 expansion slides (5-8) were folded in IN SOURCE ORDER per operator and the roster renumbered; no expansion content was compressed. The Slide 3 exemplar swap moved verbatim source content (source-outline.md 160-175) into the slot and shipped its real citations; the spine narration it replaced was removed by operator decision, not lost (it remains in C1M1Part01.md). Where the spine left a field empty (Slide 4 definition boxes) or lacked content present in a sibling rendering (Slide 9 transition narration), that content was pulled verbatim and EXPLICITLY LABELED as enrichment with provenance. Where renderings disagreed (Slide 4 def-label count; KC questions; Lexicon vs Slide 4 wording) the disagreement was reported, not guessed. External PPTX content (HII_Source.pptx) and the WHO Surgical Safety Checklist PDF attachment were NOT reconstructed — they are flagged unresolved.
